zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John I Harington of Aldingham於大約1281年出生在英國藍卡爾阿爾迪加姆時，他的父親Robert de Haverington11279歲，母親Agnes Cansfield16歲。他和Margaret de Burlingham至少有4個兒子。他於1309年登記服兵役。他去世於1347年7月2日在他的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾卡特梅爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John I Harington of Aldingham于大约1281年出生在英国藍卡爾阿爾迪加姆时，他的父亲Robert de Haverington11279岁，母亲Agnes Cansfield16岁。他和Margaret de Burlingham至少有4个儿子。他于1309年登记服兵役。他去世于1347年7月2日在他的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾卡特梅爾。

nameMeanings.name: Harington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Harrington
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Harrington (Cumberland, Lincolnshire, Northamptonshire). The Cumberland placename derives from the Old English personal name Hæfer + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The Lincolnshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hearra + Old English connective -ing- + tūn. The Northamptonshire derives from an Old English personal name Hǣthhere + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Herendeen .
Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArrachtáin ‘descendant of Arrachtán’, a personal name from a diminutive of arrachtach ‘mighty, powerful’.
Irish: in Kerry, this name was adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hIongardail, later Ó hUrdáil, ‘descendant of Iongardal’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John I Harington of Aldingham was born about 1281, in Aldingham, Lancashire, England, his father, Robert de Haverington, was 11279 and his mother, Agnes Cansfield, was 16. He had at least 4 sons with Margaret de Burlingham. He registered for military service in 1309. He died on 2 July 1347, in his hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Cartmel, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John I Harington of Aldingham est né environ 1281, à Aldingham, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Haverington, avait 11279 ans et sa mère, Agnes Cansfield, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Margaret de Burlingham. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1309. Il est décédé le 2 juillet 1347, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Cartmel, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John I Harington of Aldingham um 1281 in Aldingham, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Haverington 11279 und seine Mutter Agnes Cansfield 16. Er hatte mit Margaret de Burlingham mindestens 4 Söhne. Er hat sich 1309 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 2. Juli 1347 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Cartmel, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John I Harington of Aldingham è nato il circa 1281 nel Aldingham, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Haverington, aveva 11279 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Cansfield, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Margaret de Burlingham. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1309. Morì il 2 luglio 1347, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Cartmel, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John I Harington of Aldinghamが約1281年にイギリスランカシュアイアアルディンガムで生まれた時，父Robert de Haveringtonは11279歳，母Agnes Cansfieldは16歳であった。彼はMargaret de Burlinghamとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1309年に兵役登録をした。彼は1347年7月2日に故郷で67歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアカートメルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John I Harington of Aldingham(이)가 대략 1281년 영국 랭카실르 알딩함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Haverington(은)는 11279세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Cansfield(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Margaret de Burlingham(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1309년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1347년 7월 2일 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 카트멀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John I Harington of Aldingham nasceu aproximadamente 1281, em Aldingham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Haverington, tinha 11279 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Cansfield, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Margaret de Burlingham. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1309. Ele faleceu em 2 de julho de 1347, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Cartmel, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John I Harington of Aldingham родился около 1281 г. в местности алдингхам, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Haverington было 11279 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Cansfield, 16. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Margaret de Burlingham. В 1309 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 2 июля 1347 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности картмел, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John I Harington of Aldingham nació aproximadamente 1281, en Aldingham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Haverington, tenía 11279 años y su mamá, Agnes Cansfield, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Margaret de Burlingham. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1309. Murió el 2 de julio de 1347, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Cartmel, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
